form.formComment: Drawn the inside alley. Most recently finished last on April 5 over 512m at Mt Gambier behind Compton Gypsy beaten 13 lengths (30.44) in a Grade 4/5. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Drawn the inside alley. Most recently finished last on April 5 over 512m at Mt Gambier behind Compton Gypsy beaten 13 lengths (30.44) in a Grade 4/5. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked shortly after start; Checked turn into back straight.

form.formComment: Strong performance to post a big 4.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at Sale, clocking a slick 24.41 over the 435m trip. Should be in this for a long way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to post a big 4.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at Sale, clocking a slick 24.41 over the 435m trip. Should be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Strong performance leading throughout to score by 4.5 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at Warrnambool, recording a quick 25.33 over the 450m journey. Hard to top on that run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance leading throughout to score by 4.5 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at Warrnambool, recording a quick 25.33 over the 450m journey. Hard to top on that run.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (35.40) in a Grade 5, finishing a 15 length seventh. Has two successes and two minors from seven starts from box 4. Tough line-up and may struggle.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (35.40) in a Grade 5, finishing a 15 length seventh. Has two successes and two minors from seven starts from box 4. Tough line-up and may struggle.

form.formComment: Ordinary effort last start when he got back too far over 460m at Warragul. Prior to that won by 2.25 lengths at Sale (28.61) beating Elijah Rose in a Restricted WIN on March 29. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ordinary effort last start when he got back too far over 460m at Warragul. Prior to that won by 2.25 lengths at Sale (28.61) beating Elijah Rose in a Restricted WIN on March 29. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (26.24) over 460m at Warragul. Will need plenty of luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last start (26.24) over 460m at Warragul. Will need plenty of luck.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at The Meadows to win by 5 lengths in 30.51, beating Lady Rapid. Last start finished 6th on April 2 over 515m at this track behind Lady Rapid beaten 6 lengths (30.16) in a Restricted WIN. Leading chance on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Surprised two starts back at The Meadows to win by 5 lengths in 30.51, beating Lady Rapid. Last start finished 6th on April 2 over 515m at this track behind Lady Rapid beaten 6 lengths (30.16) in a Restricted WIN. Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 0.8 lengths over 450m at Warrnambool (25.38). Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.
